tasks.subject: Task 1: Vendor datastar SDK + JS
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add datastar Go SDK to go.mod, vendor datastar.min.js, register in ui_assets.go.

**Files:**
- Modify: go.mod, go.sum, flake.nix, cmd/breezyd/ui_assets.go
- Create: cmd/breezyd/ui/vendor/datastar-1.0.0-RC.11.min.js

**Verify:** `just check && just nix-check`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["go.mod", "go.sum", "flake.nix", "cmd/breezyd/ui_assets.go", "cmd/breezyd/ui/vendor/datastar-1.0.0-RC.11.min.js"], "verifyCommand": "just check && just nix-check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["go build clean", "datastarVersion constant", "vendor served with cache header", "flake.nix vendorHash updated"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: PushHub
tasks.description:
**Goal:** New PushHub type managing subscriber fan-out.

**Files:**
- Create: cmd/breezyd/push_hub.go, cmd/breezyd/push_hub_test.go

**Verify:** `go test ./cmd/breezyd/ -run TestPushHub -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cmd/breezyd/push_hub.go", "cmd/breezyd/push_hub_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./cmd/breezyd/ -run TestPushHub -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["fan-out works", "drop-oldest under pressure", "concurrent-safe", "render error tolerated"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: getUISSE handler + onPoll wiring
tasks.description:
**Goal:** New GET /ui/sse endpoint. Compose handler.SyncHomekit + handler.PushHub.Notify in onPoll. Dashboard still uses htmx in parallel.

**Files:**
- Create: cmd/breezyd/handlers_ui_sse.go, cmd/breezyd/handlers_ui_sse_test.go
- Modify: cmd/breezyd/server.go, cmd/breezyd/main.go, cmd/breezyd/push_hub.go, internal/uistate/state.go (nil-safe Parse)

**Verify:** `go test ./cmd/breezyd/ -run 'TestPushHub|TestGetUISSE' -v && just check`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cmd/breezyd/handlers_ui_sse.go", "cmd/breezyd/handlers_ui_sse_test.go", "cmd/breezyd/server.go", "cmd/breezyd/main.go", "cmd/breezyd/push_hub.go", "internal/uistate/state.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./cmd/breezyd/ -run 'TestPushHub|TestGetUISSE' -v && just check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["initial state events", "notify delivers", "context cancel cleans up", "keepalive emitted"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Cutover — datastar + drop htmx + drop uistate
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Switch dashboard from htmx to datastar in one cutover. Action handlers stop returning HTML. Templates use data-* attrs. Drop htmx, internal/uistate, 4 DeviceView fields, computeDetailsOpen, getUIDeviceList, getUIDeviceCard, ~210 lines inline JS.

**Files:**
- Modify: handlers_ui_write.go, handlers_ui_read.go, server.go, ui/view.go, all *.templ, style.css, ui_assets.go, render_test.go, testdata/, handlers_ui_*_test.go, layout.templ
- Delete: internal/uistate/, htmx vendor JS files
- Create: cmd/breezyd/ui/vendor/dashboard.js

**Verify:** `just check && just build && # smoke-test binary with fakedevice`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cmd/breezyd/handlers_ui_write.go", "cmd/breezyd/handlers_ui_read.go", "cmd/breezyd/server.go", "cmd/breezyd/ui/view.go", "cmd/breezyd/ui/templates/", "cmd/breezyd/ui/style.css", "cmd/breezyd/ui_assets.go", "internal/uistate/", "cmd/breezyd/ui/vendor/"], "verifyCommand": "just check && just build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["check clean", "no htmx references", "SSE-driven updates work", "action endpoints reshaped", "goldens updated"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Convert threshold + schedule fragment endpoints to SSE
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Threshold and schedule fragment endpoints emit SSE event streams instead of raw HTML.

**Files:**
- Modify: cmd/breezyd/handlers_ui_write.go, cmd/breezyd/handlers_ui_write_test.go, cmd/breezyd/ui/templates/sensors_block.templ, cmd/breezyd/ui/templates/schedule_block.templ

**Verify:** `go test ./cmd/breezyd/ -run 'TestUIThreshold|TestUISchedule' -v && just check`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cmd/breezyd/handlers_ui_write.go", "cmd/breezyd/handlers_ui_write_test.go", "cmd/breezyd/ui/templates/sensors_block.templ", "cmd/breezyd/ui/templates/schedule_block.templ"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./cmd/breezyd/ -run 'TestUIThreshold|TestUISchedule' -v && just check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["fragment endpoints emit SSE", "templates use datastar attrs", "editors work in browser"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Playwright suite update
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Adapt Playwright suite for SSE-driven dashboard.

**Files:**
- Modify: tests/ui/dashboard.spec.ts, tests/ui/screenshot.ts, tests/ui/global-setup.ts (if needed)
- Regenerate: tests/ui/screenshots/dashboard-3col.png

**Verify:** `just test-ui`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/ui/dashboard.spec.ts", "tests/ui/screenshot.ts", "tests/ui/global-setup.ts", "tests/ui/screenshots/dashboard-3col.png"], "verifyCommand": "just test-ui", "acceptanceCriteria": ["cookie tests dropped", "SSE-driven assertions", "cross-tab + reconnect tests added", "screenshot regenerated"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: NixOS module nginx config
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Auto-configured nginx location adds SSE-friendly directives.

**Files:**
- Modify: nix/module.nix

**Verify:** `just nix-check && nix build`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["nix/module.nix"], "verifyCommand": "just nix-check && nix build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["proxy_buffering off", "proxy_cache off", "proxy_http_version 1.1", "Connection header", "proxy_read_timeout 1d"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: CHANGELOG + CLAUDE.md + README
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Bring docs in line with the new architecture.

**Files:**
- Modify: CHANGELOG.md, CLAUDE.md, README.md (if applicable)

**Verify:** `just check && grep -rn 'htmx-2|breezy-ui|computeDetailsOpen|internal/uistate' --include='*.go' --include='*.md' --include='*.templ' --include='*.css' --include='*.ts' --include='*.nix' .` (no hits)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["CHANGELOG.md", "CLAUDE.md", "README.md"], "verifyCommand": "just check && grep -rn 'htmx-2|breezy-ui|computeDetailsOpen|internal/uistate' --include='*.go' --include='*.md' --include='*.templ' --include='*.css' --include='*.ts' --include='*.nix' .", "acceptanceCriteria": ["CHANGELOG entries complete", "CLAUDE.md updated", "no stale references"]}
```
